vm;C:
vm4w

testcase.name: setUp

failure.message:
Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s 100.119.228.107\:45163 install -g 'C:\Users\Administrator\.appium\node_modules\appium-uiautomator2-driver\node_modules\io.appium.settings\apks\settings_apk-debug.apk'' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb.exe: device offline
Host info: host: 'VIAUTOMATE', ip: '100.102.180.112' Build info: version: '4.13.0', revision: 'ba948ece5b*' System info: os.name: 'Windows Server 2022', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: io.appium.java_client.android.AndroidDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[{appium:allowInsecure=adb_shell, appium:systemPort=8200, appium:skipServerInstallation=true, appium:newCommandTimeout=300, appium:nativeWebScreenshot=true, appium:enforceAppInstall=false, appium:automationName=UiAutomator2, appium:fullReset=false, appium:skipDeviceInitialization=false, appium:platformVersion=15, appium:noReset=true, appium:udid=100.119.228.107:45163, appium:autoGrantPermissions=true, appium:relaxedSecurityEnabled=true, appium:adbExecTimeout=120000, appium:connectHardwareKeyboard=true, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError=true, appium:disableWindowAnimation=true, appium:appActivity=com.google.android.dialer.extensions.GoogleDialtactsActivity, appium:deviceName=moto g85 5G, platformName=ANDROID, appium:appPackage=com.google.android.dialer, appium:ensureWebviewsHavePages=true}], desiredCapabilities=Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:allowInsecure: adb_shell, appium:appActivity: com.google.android.dialer.e..., appium:appPackage: com.google.android.dialer, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:connectHardwareKeyboard: true, appium:deviceName: moto g85 5G, appium:disableWindowAnimation: true, appium:enforceAppInstall: false, appium:ensureWebviewsHavePages: true, appium:fullReset: false, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true, appium:nativeWebScreenshot: true, appium:newCommandTimeout: 300, appium:noReset: true, appium:platformVersion: 15, appium:relaxedSecurityEnabled: true, appium:skipDeviceInitialization: false, appium:skipServerInstallation: true, appium:systemPort: 8200, appium:udid: 100.119.228.107:45163, platformName: ANDROID}}] Capabilities {appium:adbExecTimeout: 120000, appium:allowInsecure: adb_shell, appium:appActivity: com.google.android.dialer.e..., appium:appPackage: com.google.android.dialer, appium:autoGrantPermissions: true, appium:automationName: UiAutomator2, appium:connectHardwareKeyboard: true, appium:deviceName: moto g85 5G, appium:disableWindowAnimation: true, appium:enforceAppInstall: false, appium:ensureWebviewsHavePages: true, appium:fullReset: false, appium:ignoreHiddenApiPolicyError: true, appium:nativeWebScreenshot: true, appium:newCommandTimeout: 300, appium:noReset: true, appium:platformVersion: 15, appium:relaxedSecurityEnabled: true, appium:skipDeviceInitialization: false, appium:skipServerInstallation: true, appium:systemPort: 8200, appium:udid: 100.119.228.107:45163, platformName: ANDROID}

at io.appium.java_client.remote.AppiumCommandExecutor.execute(AppiumCommandExecutor.java:250) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.execute(RemoteWebDriver.java:602) at org.apache.maven.surefire.testng.TestNGDirectoryTestSuite.executeSingleClass(TestNGDirectoryTestSuite.java:102) at 🌐 Setting up Data Usage Test Environment... Using existing Appium server 🚀 Initializing driver for: 100.119.228.107:45163 🔍 Looking for available port for device: 100.119.228.107:45163 Assigned port 8200 to device 100.119.228.107:45163 ❌ Driver initialization failed: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Error executing adbExec. Original error: 'Command ''C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe' -P 5037 -s 100.119.228.107\:45163 install -g 'C:\Users\Administrator\.appium\node_modules\appium-uiautomator2-driver\node_modules\io.appium.settings\apks\settings_apk-debug.apk'' exited with code 1'; Command output: adb.exe: device offline
